name: h-tree
description: A small dependency-free hierarchical tree-view with tri-state checkboxes

scripts.serve: node -e "import('node:http').then(http => import('node:fs').then(fs => import('node:path').then(path => { http.default.createServer((req,res) => { const u = req.url === '/' ? '/index.html' : req.url; const p = path.default.join(process.cwd(), u); try { const t = u.endsWith('.js') ? 'text/javascript' : u.endsWith('.css') ? 'text/css' : 'text/html'; res.writeHead(200, {'Content-Type': t}); res.end(fs.default.readFileSync(p)); } catch { res.writeHead(404); res.end('Not found'); } }).listen(8000, () => console.log('http://localhost:8000')); })))"

author: Hassan Bagheri <bagheri.h@gmail.com>
